selection_policy.scope: Top 10 exposed MBTI64 single personality pages from repo GSC/priority artifacts.
selection_policy.note: This artifact packages draft CMS fields only. Publishing requires an explicit backend/CMS import PR or approval-gated CMS operation.

cms_fields.title: INTP-A 逻辑学家人格：特点、A/T差异、职业与关系 | FermatMind
cms_fields.h1: INTP-A 逻辑学家人格特点
cms_fields.meta_description: 系统了解 INTP-A 的分析、概念建模和独立解题，以及更稳定地推进自己的判断，较少反复寻求外部确认。包含适合谁、不适合谁、常见误解、职业、关系、压力场景和 FAQ。
cms_fields.answer_block: INTP-A 是 INTP 核心人格加上 A 型身份风格的公开解释页，重点说明分析、概念建模和独立解题，并补充更稳定地推进自己的判断，较少反复寻求外部确认。阅读时应把它当作测试结果后的解释框架，用来比较个人偏好、压力反应和沟通方式。它适合用于自我理解、沟通校准和测试结果延伸，不适合作为职业录用、诊断或关系结论。

modules.body: INTP-A 不是独立于 INTP 的新类型，而是在 INTP 的认知与行为偏好上加入 A/T 身份风格视角，用来解释自信稳定度、反馈处理和压力下复盘方式。
适合已经知道自己可能接近 INTP，并希望理解分析、概念建模和独立解题如何影响学习、工作、关系沟通、压力处理和自我复盘的人。
不适合把人格类型当作招聘筛选、医学诊断、伴侣匹配结论或能力证明的人；页面只能提供语言和观察框架，不能替代个人评估或专业判断。
常见误解是把 INTP-A 看成永远自信或永远正确。更准确的理解是：它描述反馈和不确定性下的倾向，不代表能力上限、道德水平或固定命运。
INTP-A 与 INTP 的关系是“基础 16 型 + A/T 身份风格”。基础 16 型解释信息关注和决策偏好，A/T 解释自我确认、压力反应和反馈复盘。
INTP-A 与 INTP-T 的主要差异不在兴趣或能力，而在压力后是否更频繁复盘、是否更容易受外界评价牵动，以及行动前需要多少确认。
职业场景应围绕分析、概念建模和独立解题来观察任务结构、反馈节奏、协作方式、决策责任和长期成长条件，而不是直接得出职业结论。
关系场景适合观察表达需求、回应冲突、处理边界和修复误会的方式；不要用 INTP-A 给对方贴标签或替代真实沟通与持续反馈。
压力下重点观察更稳定地推进自己的判断，较少反复寻求外部确认是否让行动更稳定，或是否导致忽视新证据；建议配合具体情境记录，而不是只看类型名。

faq.question: INTP-A 人格特点是什么？
faq.answer: INTP-A 通常体现为分析、概念建模和独立解题，并在 A/T 维度上呈现更稳定地推进自己的判断，较少反复寻求外部确认。

faq.question: INTP-A 适合什么工作？
faq.answer: 更适合讨论任务环境和工作方式，例如反馈频率、独立度、协作密度和决策责任；不能直接推出职业结论。

faq.question: INTP-A 和 INTP-T 有什么不同？
faq.answer: 主要差异在自我确认、压力反应和反馈复盘方式，而不是基础兴趣、能力或价值高低；判断时应结合真实情境。

faq.question: INTP-A 在关系中容易被误解什么？
faq.answer: 容易被简化成固定标签。实际关系仍要看沟通习惯、边界、承诺、冲突修复方式和双方持续反馈。

faq.question: 这个页面可以替代 MBTI 测试吗？
faq.answer: 不能。它是公共解释和内容资产草案，个人结果仍应结合正式测试、完整报告、真实反馈和长期观察。

cms_fields.title: ESFP-A 表演者人格：特点、A/T差异、职业与关系 | FermatMind
cms_fields.meta_description: 系统了解 ESFP-A 的现场感、表达力和即时互动，以及更容易把当下反馈转化为行动，而不是长时间纠结外部评价。包含适合谁、不适合谁、常见误解、职业、关系、压力场景和 FAQ。

关系场景适合观察表达需求、回应冲突、处理边界和修复误会的方式；不要用 ESFP-A 给对方贴标签或替代真实沟通与持续反馈。
压力下重点观察更容易把当下反馈转化为行动，而不是长时间纠结外部评价是否让行动更稳定，或是否导致忽视新证据；建议配合具体情境记录，而不是只看类型名。

faq.question: ESFP-A 人格特点是什么？
faq.answer: ESFP-A 通常体现为现场感、表达力和即时互动，并在 A/T 维度上呈现更容易把当下反馈转化为行动，而不是长时间纠结外部评价。

cms_fields.title: ENFJ-A Protagonist Personality: Traits, A/T Difference, Career and Relationships | FermatMind
cms_fields.meta_description: Understand ENFJ-A through people leadership, values alignment, and group momentum,  steadier self-trust when coordinating others and absorbing feedback, fit signals, misreads, A/T differences, career, relationships, stress scenarios, and FAQ.
cms_fields.answer_block: ENFJ-A is a public profile page for the ENFJ core pattern plus the A identity style. It explains people leadership, values alignment, and group momentum and  steadier self-trust when coordinating others and absorbing feedback. Use it for self-understanding and communication calibration, not for hiring, diagnosis, or relationship conclusions.

modules.body: ENFJ-A is not a separate system from ENFJ; it layers the A/T identity style onto the base type to explain confidence, feedback processing, and pressure recovery.
Best for readers who already relate to ENFJ and want to understand how people leadership, values alignment, and group momentum may show up in work, learning, relationships, and stress.
Not suitable as a hiring filter, clinical diagnosis, relationship verdict, or proof of ability. The page provides a language framework only.
A common misread is treating ENFJ-A as permanently confident, fragile, talented, or limited. It describes tendencies under feedback and uncertainty, not fixed capability.
ENFJ-A combines the base ENFJ pattern with an A/T identity style. The base type explains preference patterns; A/T explains confidence, self-review, and pressure response.
ENFJ-A differs from ENFJ-T mostly in self-confirmation, feedback sensitivity, and how much review is needed before acting, not in worth or ability.

Career discussion should focus on task structure, feedback rhythm, autonomy, collaboration, and decision ownership around people leadership, values alignment, and group momentum, not on deterministic job matching.
Relationship discussion should focus on needs, boundaries, conflict repair, and communication habits. Do not use ENFJ-A as a label that replaces real conversation.

Under stress, watch whether  steadier self-trust when coordinating others and absorbing feedback supports steadier action or leads to ignoring new evidence. Pair the profile with concrete situation notes.

faq.question: What are ENFJ-A personality traits?
faq.answer: ENFJ-A usually combines people leadership, values alignment, and group momentum with  steadier self-trust when coordinating others and absorbing feedback.

faq.question: What careers fit ENFJ-A?
faq.answer: Use this page to discuss work environments and task patterns, not to make deterministic career decisions.

faq.question: How is ENFJ-A different from ENFJ-T?
faq.answer: The difference is mainly self-confirmation, pressure response, and feedback review style, not ability or value.

faq.question: What is a common ENFJ-A misconception?
faq.answer: A common misconception is turning the type into a fixed label instead of a context-sensitive reflection tool.

faq.question: Can this page replace an MBTI test?
faq.answer: No. It is a public explanation and non-production content asset; personal results should come from a full assessment and report.

cms_fields.title: ESFJ-T Consul Personality: Traits, A/T Difference, Career and Relationships | FermatMind
cms_fields.meta_description: Understand ESFJ-T through relationship maintenance, shared standards, and practical support, more frequent self-review when group expectations or feedback shift, fit signals, misreads, A/T differences, career, relationships, stress scenarios, and FAQ.
cms_fields.answer_block: ESFJ-T is a public profile page for the ESFJ core pattern plus the T identity style. It explains relationship maintenance, shared standards, and practical support and more frequent self-review when group expectations or feedback shift. Use it for self-understanding and communication calibration, not for hiring, diagnosis, or relationship conclusions.

modules.body: ESFJ-T is not a separate system from ESFJ; it layers the A/T identity style onto the base type to explain confidence, feedback processing, and pressure recovery.
Best for readers who already relate to ESFJ and want to understand how relationship maintenance, shared standards, and practical support may show up in work, learning, relationships, and stress.
Not suitable as a hiring filter, clinical diagnosis, relationship verdict, or proof of ability. The page provides a language framework only.
A common misread is treating ESFJ-T as permanently confident, fragile, talented, or limited. It describes tendencies under feedback and uncertainty, not fixed capability.
ESFJ-T combines the base ESFJ pattern with an A/T identity style. The base type explains preference patterns; A/T explains confidence, self-review, and pressure response.
ESFJ-T differs from ESFJ-A mostly in self-confirmation, feedback sensitivity, and how much review is needed before acting, not in worth or ability.

Career discussion should focus on task structure, feedback rhythm, autonomy, collaboration, and decision ownership around relationship maintenance, shared standards, and practical support, not on deterministic job matching.
Relationship discussion should focus on needs, boundaries, conflict repair, and communication habits. Do not use ESFJ-T as a label that replaces real conversation.

Under stress, watch whether more frequent self-review when group expectations or feedback shift supports steadier action or leads to ignoring new evidence. Pair the profile with concrete situation notes.

faq.question: What are ESFJ-T personality traits?
faq.answer: ESFJ-T usually combines relationship maintenance, shared standards, and practical support with more frequent self-review when group expectations or feedback shift.

faq.question: What careers fit ESFJ-T?
faq.answer: Use this page to discuss work environments and task patterns, not to make deterministic career decisions.

faq.question: How is ESFJ-T different from ESFJ-A?
faq.answer: The difference is mainly self-confirmation, pressure response, and feedback review style, not ability or value.

faq.question: What is a common ESFJ-T misconception?
faq.answer: A common misconception is turning the type into a fixed label instead of a context-sensitive reflection tool.

faq.question: Can this page replace an MBTI test?
faq.answer: No. It is a public explanation and non-production content asset; personal results should come from a full assessment and report.

cms_fields.title: INTP-A Logician Personality: Traits, A/T Difference, Career and Relationships | FermatMind
cms_fields.meta_description: Understand INTP-A through analysis, model building, and independent problem solving, steadier confidence in chosen hypotheses and less repeated reassurance seeking, fit signals, misreads, A/T differences, career, relationships, stress scenarios, and FAQ.
cms_fields.answer_block: INTP-A is a public profile page for the INTP core pattern plus the A identity style. It explains analysis, model building, and independent problem solving and steadier confidence in chosen hypotheses and less repeated reassurance seeking. Use it for self-understanding and communication calibration, not for hiring, diagnosis, or relationship conclusions.

modules.body: INTP-A is not a separate system from INTP; it layers the A/T identity style onto the base type to explain confidence, feedback processing, and pressure recovery.
Best for readers who already relate to INTP and want to understand how analysis, model building, and independent problem solving may show up in work, learning, relationships, and stress.
Not suitable as a hiring filter, clinical diagnosis, relationship verdict, or proof of ability. The page provides a language framework only.
A common misread is treating INTP-A as permanently confident, fragile, talented, or limited. It describes tendencies under feedback and uncertainty, not fixed capability.
INTP-A combines the base INTP pattern with an A/T identity style. The base type explains preference patterns; A/T explains confidence, self-review, and pressure response.
INTP-A differs from INTP-T mostly in self-confirmation, feedback sensitivity, and how much review is needed before acting, not in worth or ability.

Career discussion should focus on task structure, feedback rhythm, autonomy, collaboration, and decision ownership around analysis, model building, and independent problem solving, not on deterministic job matching.
Relationship discussion should focus on needs, boundaries, conflict repair, and communication habits. Do not use INTP-A as a label that replaces real conversation.

Under stress, watch whether steadier confidence in chosen hypotheses and less repeated reassurance seeking supports steadier action or leads to ignoring new evidence. Pair the profile with concrete situation notes.

faq.answer: INTP-A usually combines analysis, model building, and independent problem solving with steadier confidence in chosen hypotheses and less repeated reassurance seeking.

faq.answer: Use this page to discuss work environments and task patterns, not to make deterministic career decisions.

cms_fields.title: ISTJ-A 物流师人格：特点、A/T差异、职业与关系 | FermatMind
cms_fields.meta_description: 系统了解 ISTJ-A 的秩序、责任、事实核对和稳定执行，以及更能坚持既定标准，并在反馈出现时先按证据复核。包含适合谁、不适合谁、常见误解、职业、关系、压力场景和 FAQ。
cms_fields.answer_block: ISTJ-A 是 ISTJ 核心人格加上 A 型身份风格的公开解释页，重点说明秩序、责任、事实核对和稳定执行，并补充更能坚持既定标准，并在反馈出现时先按证据复核。阅读时应把它当作测试结果后的解释框架，用来比较个人偏好、压力反应和沟通方式。它适合用于自我理解、沟通校准和测试结果延伸，不适合作为职业录用、诊断或关系结论。

modules.body: ISTJ-A 不是独立于 ISTJ 的新类型，而是在 ISTJ 的认知与行为偏好上加入 A/T 身份风格视角，用来解释自信稳定度、反馈处理和压力下复盘方式。
适合已经知道自己可能接近 ISTJ，并希望理解秩序、责任、事实核对和稳定执行如何影响学习、工作、关系沟通、压力处理和自我复盘的人。
不适合把人格类型当作招聘筛选、医学诊断、伴侣匹配结论或能力证明的人；页面只能提供语言和观察框架，不能替代个人评估或专业判断。
常见误解是把 ISTJ-A 看成永远自信或永远正确。更准确的理解是：它描述反馈和不确定性下的倾向，不代表能力上限、道德水平或固定命运。
ISTJ-A 与 ISTJ 的关系是“基础 16 型 + A/T 身份风格”。基础 16 型解释信息关注和决策偏好，A/T 解释自我确认、压力反应和反馈复盘。
ISTJ-A 与 ISTJ-T 的主要差异不在兴趣或能力，而在压力后是否更频繁复盘、是否更容易受外界评价牵动，以及行动前需要多少确认。
职业场景应围绕秩序、责任、事实核对和稳定执行来观察任务结构、反馈节奏、协作方式、决策责任和长期成长条件，而不是直接得出职业结论。
关系场景适合观察表达需求、回应冲突、处理边界和修复误会的方式；不要用 ISTJ-A 给对方贴标签或替代真实沟通与持续反馈。
压力下重点观察更能坚持既定标准，并在反馈出现时先按证据复核是否让行动更稳定，或是否导致忽视新证据；建议配合具体情境记录，而不是只看类型名。

faq.question: ISTJ-A 人格特点是什么？
faq.answer: ISTJ-A 通常体现为秩序、责任、事实核对和稳定执行，并在 A/T 维度上呈现更能坚持既定标准，并在反馈出现时先按证据复核。

faq.question: ISTJ-A 适合什么工作？
faq.answer: 更适合讨论任务环境和工作方式，例如反馈频率、独立度、协作密度和决策责任；不能直接推出职业结论。

faq.question: ISTJ-A 和 ISTJ-T 有什么不同？
faq.answer: 主要差异在自我确认、压力反应和反馈复盘方式，而不是基础兴趣、能力或价值高低；判断时应结合真实情境。

faq.question: ISTJ-A 在关系中容易被误解什么？
faq.answer: 容易被简化成固定标签。实际关系仍要看沟通习惯、边界、承诺、冲突修复方式和双方持续反馈。

faq.question: 这个页面可以替代 MBTI 测试吗？
faq.answer: 不能。它是公共解释和内容资产草案，个人结果仍应结合正式测试、完整报告、真实反馈和长期观察。
